name: ember
description: EmberJS skills, agents, and commands for AI coding agents — covering Octane fundamentals, routing, components, services, Ember Data, testing, the Polaris migration, and the modern addon ecosystem (ember-simple-auth, ember-concurrency, ember-test-selectors, ember-cli-page-object, ember-cli-mirage, ember-power-select, ember-modifier, ember-resources, ember-intl, and more).
